rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one claim (the base model being frozen) and marks confidence for others.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors by stating that the base model is fine-tuned, which contradicts the later statement of using a frozen mBART-50 as the base.
